title: Fair Wool Crafting
description: Adds 1 dye for 8 Wool Recipe into the game. Like most dyed blocks
body:
Adds 1 dye for 8 Wool Recipe into the game. Like most dyed blocks.
Adds recipes for 
- black_wool
- blue_wool
- brown_wool
- cyan_wool
- gray_wool
- green_wool
- light_blue_wool
- light_gray_wool
- lime_wool
- magenta_wool
- orange_wool
- pink_wool
- purple_wool
- red_wool
- white_wool
- yellow_wool
